scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/backend" "npm run dev -w apps/channel-service" "npm run dev -w apps/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/backend && npm run build -w apps/channel-service && npm run build -w apps/frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/shared && npm run typecheck -w apps/backend && npm run typecheck -w apps/channel-service && npm run typecheck -w apps/frontend
